hero.title: We Build Modern Software Solutions for Growing Businesses
hero.description: Rossmann helps organizations accelerate digital transformation through custom software development, cloud technologies, enterprise solutions and AI-powered applications.

services.title: Solutions We Deliver
services.description: We provide end-to-end software development services tailored to your business goals.

custom.title: Custom Software Development
custom.description: Scalable web, desktop and enterprise applications built around your business.

web.title: Web Development

mobile.title: Mobile Applications
mobile.description: Native and cross-platform mobile apps delivering exceptional user experiences.

cloud.title: Cloud Solutions
cloud.description: Migration, deployment and management of cloud infrastructure on Azure and AWS.

ai.title: AI & Automation
ai.description: Artificial intelligence, automation and machine learning solutions that improve productivity.

consulting.title: IT Consulting
consulting.description: Technology consulting to help organizations plan, modernize and scale their digital platforms.

why.title: Why Choose Rossmann
why.description: We combine technical expertise, innovation and business understanding to build software that delivers measurable results.

expertise.title: Experienced Team
expertise.description: Our engineers bring years of experience in enterprise software, cloud technologies and AI.

performance.title: High Performance
performance.description: We build fast, scalable and reliable systems designed for long-term growth.

security.title: Secure by Design
security.description: Security best practices are integrated into every stage of development.

partnership.title: Long-Term Partnership
partnership.description: We work closely with clients to deliver solutions that continue creating value after launch.

technologies.title: Modern Technologies We Work With
technologies.description: We use industry-leading technologies to build secure, scalable and high-performance software.

projects.title: Реализованные решения
projects.description: От корпоративных систем до AI-приложений — мы создаём программное обеспечение, которое решает реальные бизнес-задачи.

enterprise.title: Платформа управления предприятием
enterprise.description: ERP-система для автоматизации внутренних процессов и повышения эффективности бизнеса.

ai.title: AI-помощник для клиентов
ai.description: Интеллектуальный чат-бот на базе больших языковых моделей, сокративший нагрузку на службу поддержки на 60%.

cloud.title: Модернизация облачной инфраструктуры
cloud.description: Перенос устаревшей инфраструктуры в AWS с автоматизированными CI/CD-процессами.

footer.description: Building modern software, AI and cloud solutions that help businesses grow through innovation and technology.

contact.title: Let's Build Something Great Together
contact.description: Have a project in mind? We'd love to hear about it. Send us a message and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.
